title: ImplementationTask
description: A bounded implementation task created by Claude and executed by Codex in a temporary worktree.

base_commit.description: Full git commit SHA the worktree is based on. Used by patch application policy.

description.description: Full description of what Codex should implement, including context and constraints.

acceptance_criteria.description: List of testable criteria that define done.

files_in_scope.description: Optional list of file paths Codex is expected to touch. Non-exhaustive; for guidance.

files_off_limits.description: Optional list of file paths Codex must not modify.

validation_commands.description: Commands Codex should run to validate its work (e.g. pytest invocations).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when Claude created the task.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata for future routing, token-budget, or worker-pool extensions.
